name: ai-suite-int-wide
prompt: Photorealistic ultra-wide-angle interior view inside a premium acoustic office pod. Camera in the back of the pod looking forward through the tempered glass front door. Integrated white work desk on right side with metal supports and a closed laptop, charcoal felt acoustic walls with realistic textile texture, soft warm LED strip ceiling lighting, black ventilation grille at top center, polished aluminum frame, dark grey carpet floor. Through the glass: softly lit modern open-plan office with daylight, blurred desks visible. Cinematic, premium architectural photography, ultra-detailed, sharp, evenly lit, no people, no text, no logos, no watermarks.

name: ai-suite-pov
prompt: Photorealistic point-of-view shot from a person seated at the integrated desk inside an acoustic office pod, facing the closed tempered glass door. Edge of white desk in foreground, an open silver laptop with soft blue screen glow, a black notebook beside it, charcoal felt acoustic walls left and right, warm LED strip ceiling overhead, black ventilation grille at top of front wall, polished aluminum frame around the glass door. Through the glass: a soft-focus modern open-plan office. Cinematic depth-of-field, sharp foreground, photorealistic, no people, no text, no logos.

name: ai-suite-orbit
prompt: Photorealistic three-quarter exterior view of a premium standalone six-person acoustic office pod isolated on a clean light-grey gradient studio background. Charcoal aluminum frame, full-height tempered glass front with integrated black framed door, charcoal felt acoustic side and back walls, sleek polished aluminum top panel, soft drop shadow under the pod. Camera at 30 degree angle from front-right showing front face and right side. Premium product photography, even studio lighting, sharp, photorealistic, no people, no text, no logos.
